title: Claims Analyst
description: Charles Schwab is seeking a detail-oriented Claims Analyst to join our Denver office. You'll process and investigate client claims, ensuring accuracy and timeliness across our brokerage operations. This hybrid role offers the flexibility to work from home while collaborating with our operations team on site when needed. If you excel at problem-solving and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we'd like to meet you.
responsibilities: Review and process incoming claims submissions, verifying documentation and claim eligibility
Investigate discrepancies and contact clients to obtain additional information or clarification
Maintain detailed records of all claim activities and document findings in our case management system
Coordinate with legal and compliance teams to resolve complex or disputed claims
Generate monthly reports on claims volume, resolution rates, and trend analysis
Meet performance targets for claim processing time while maintaining 98%+ accuracy

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Business Administration, or related field
skills: Strong attention to detail and accuracy
certifications: Series 7 or Series 63 (preferred but not required)

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Hybrid work arrangement (2-3 days on site)
Professional development and tuition reimbursement programs
